captureSteps.instruction: Capture the one-screen Veil launcher before opening the selected Windows app.
captureSteps.title: Pre-Boot Launcher

captureSteps.instruction: Start or queue the selected Windows app and capture the first visible launch state.
captureSteps.title: First App Launch

captureSteps.instruction: Capture the mirrored Windows app window after the launcher is hidden.
captureSteps.title: App Window Only

captureSteps.instruction: Open the menu or Dock control and capture restore, reconnect, bring-forward, or close actions.
captureSteps.title: Menu Restore

captureSteps.instruction: Close the final Windows app window and capture the returned launcher or quiet-Windows control.
captureSteps.title: Close And Quiet

nextActions: Capture the five required screenshots into the evidence directory as valid PNG files of at least 640 x 360.
Run `veil-vmctl app-runtime-review --evidence-dir /tmp/veil-review-readme` and confirm Screenshots is 5/5 attached.

screenshotFiles.expectedSurface: One Veil launcher window with setup or start action visible.
screenshotFiles.title: Pre-Boot Launcher

screenshotFiles.expectedSurface: A selected Windows app is opening, queued, or ready with one concrete next action.
screenshotFiles.title: First App Launch

screenshotFiles.expectedSurface: The mirrored Windows app window is visible while the launcher is hidden unless recovery is needed.
screenshotFiles.title: App Window Only

screenshotFiles.expectedSurface: Menu or Dock controls can bring forward, restore, reconnect, or close Windows app windows.
screenshotFiles.title: Menu Restore

screenshotFiles.expectedSurface: After the final Windows app window closes, the launcher returns or quiet Windows action is available.
screenshotFiles.title: Close And Quiet
